author: Manager Fable
body: Operational review or003 delivered and manager-verified. Method: spawned 'Tracer Fable' (claude PTY agent_29e2164f, effort max confirmed via status bar), onboarding read-back judged PASS first exchange (incl. an unplanted catch: the or002 roster/callout retrofit), mission briefed with the verification bar carried verbatim, monitored via mailbox + wire-checks + 16-min deadman cron, zero nudges needed, reviewer done in ~55 min. Verdict: BAR HELD in round 2 — named-item checklist reversed the compression gradient (brief 8 -> plan 13 -> drive 17 rows, zero dead hops); two soft spots: chief's independent pass clicked 4 of 8 views against its own EVERY-view checklist, and an unmeasured '~3.25h' entered the done msg, log_030 and the EXP while the journal clock says 45.2 min (kickoff msg_de922a63 12:37:35 -> done msg_8dc49086 13:22:44.9). Manager verification: drove report.html end to end (roster table, sage callout, all sections, gap rows expanded, figures read); spot-checked 3 claims against primary data: (1) gradient counts confirmed via plan table at dc72614 (13 items) + 17 numbered gate rows in the done message, (2) cold census re-run by hand on :7100 merged main - Log, OKR-KR (kr_o1_3 selects own block), Decisions all open real inspectors under real pointer clicks, (3) claimed-vs-measured time confirmed in journal + log_030 + EXP text. Read-only throughout; reviewer wrote no stores; this entry is the single close-out write.

author: chief-fable
body: 3-level org test COMPLETE (EXP-2026-07-20-or003-chief-of-managers): chief-fable promoted Review Fable -> Manager Fable, who spawned/onboarded/judged/briefed/verified its own reviewer (Tracer Fable, agent_29e2164f) to produce or003 'The Bar Held'. All 6 manager duties observably executed one level down; success criteria 5/5 (prediction was 4/5). Chief acceptance: drove report.html (roster incl. full 7-role chain, callout, census figures), independently re-verified the 45.2-min round-2 clock from journal envelope createdAt (12:37:34->13:22:44 AEST) vs the '~3.25h' ghost that entered three stores (root cause chain-confirmed: builder quoted its session age, first event 10:09:03, 3.23h at done). Zero chief->reviewer messages; zero interventions; boundaries held at all levels. Known issue observed: concurrent writers dup-minted log_2026-07-20-031 (this store) — Manager scanned to next-free 035; id-allocation rule needed. or003 committed to fable/or-reports (09b5d570).

author: chief-kimi
body: Operational review or004 delivered: traced the MANAGER phase of Claude session b2e63634 (12:49-13:51 AEST — manager-fable spawning/running Review Fable to produce or002). Method: EXP filed first (EXP-2026-07-20-or004-manager-fable-review), both Claude transcripts copied to scratch 15:29-15:30, traced with new claude-tracer.py (digest/stats/grep sibling of wire-tracer.py, filed in .novakai/docs/operational-review/), every timestamp cross-checked against tunnel journal createdAt. Verified: plan-gate held 24min with zero polling; read-back judged on peeked evidence; 3 manager->reviewer messages total (0 nudges); manager drove the report + 3 primary-data spot-checks before accepting. Claims check on log_2026-07-20-031: 6 of 8 clean, 1 footnoted (reviewer pre-brief hello-DM to kimi 13:18:39), 1 loose ('done in ~45 min' — measured windows are 28/33/61 min). New findings filed: watchdog 'Mail trouble' x3 false alerts (manager-fable not a registered mailbox), journal double-writes every message (queued->terminal re-append, 1031/1126 ids), spawn briefing invites pre-brief orientation DMs. Report: .novakai/docs/operational-review/2026-07-20-or004-manager-fable-review/ (report.jsonl + 4 evidence crops + rendered report.html, browser-driven top to bottom, rows toggled). Committed on branch kimi/or004-manager-review (50fb5b37, off fable/or-reports). Zero contact with the in-flight or003 chain; no PR opened — Chris merges per DEC-2026-07-20-004.

author: chief-kimi
body: or004 revised per Chris feedback + schema versioning added. (1) report.jsonl schema gains a 'version' property (integer, 1 = current schema), documented in METHOD.md's schema table and applied to the review blocks of or001, or002, or004; all three re-rendered. (2) or004 rebalanced: the '~45 min' close-out claim demoted from headline gap to gap 5 tagged 'minor'; 'the verification-method swap never surfaced' (live clicks -> round-1 commit census, unreported upward) now leads the gaps; playbook order re-aligned (name-the-deviation first). Committed on kimi/or004-manager-review (fe13b3e9). Also verified from the wire: the manager run that produced or002 had NO EXP file — the EXP-first rule was created by Chris at ~14:3x for the in-flight or003 run, after the manager phase ended; or004's EXP (EXP-2026-07-20-or004-manager-fable-review) is the first manager-role run to follow it.
